Issue: Proxy authentication credentials embedded in the proxy URL are dropped when following a redirect to the same host over HTTPS. Investigate requests/sessions.py rebuild_proxies and ensure the Proxy-Authorization header is preserved across redirects that keep the same scheme and host.
